h189ecb8dg602bg45b2gaebbg0ec0b5bea64a: Some normalcy can return to the Grove. At last.
h5c1cc94agaaa5g4866gbd53g8e27ef154f86: The other tieflings have finally left. Perhaps you will join them?
hd6711921g5142g4d0agb977gd05b1f7ded53: The tielfings have gone - good. I wish them well, but they crowded us for far too long.
hb8bd2b03g5283g4faega0ceg814a730dca6a: Without leaders, those goblins present little threat to the Grove. Silvanus has blessed us.
h09599ea4g09f6g416egb10cg096d5daa2142: I hear the goblins' leaders met their ends. Unfortunate for them, but very fortunate for the Grove.
hd4935522g3a6fg4451g846cg38fe40ce6823: Those goblins ought never to have found us. They never would have, if we'd been properly secluded.
h3d3cba16gf16dg449fg8766g80e154eb38f2: Goblins at our gates. In our home. Silvanus' mercy...
